level1_segments.summary: The scrub nurse intermittently prepares the instrument table and holds surgical instruments with brief pauses in between.
The scrub nurse actively holds instruments, prepares the table, and manipulates the Mako robotic arm while assisting the surgeon.
The scrub nurse prepares the instrument table and assists the assistant surgeon before a brief pause.

The scrub nurse actively assists the head surgeon while holding surgical instruments.
The scrub nurse prepares the instrument table and patient while intermittently holding instruments.

The nurse engages in a continuous cycle of patient preparation, instrument management, and direct assistance to the surgical team, including drill support.
Following a dedicated period of instrument table preparation, the nurse resumes alternating between tool handling, patient care, and assisting the surgeon for the remainder of the workflow.

level1_segments.summary: The robotic system undergoes a comprehensive pre-surgery calibration sequence including arm status, homing, accuracy, brake, and angle discrepancy checks.
The surgical team performs intra-operative planning and repeated RIO checks, including a patient timeout, to finalize the surgical plan before bone registration.
The procedure transitions to bone registration followed by iterative bone preparation and surface verification checks for anterior, distal, and posterior regions.
The robotic monitor initiates a new start sequence, indicating the beginning of a subsequent phase or procedure.

level2_segments.summary: The robotic system undergoes a comprehensive pre-surgery calibration sequence to verify arm status, homing, accuracy, and brake functionality.
The surgical team performs intra-operative planning and repeated RIO checks, including a patient timeout, to finalize the surgical plan.
The procedure transitions to bone registration followed by iterative bone preparation and surface verification checks for anterior, distal, and posterior regions.
The robotic monitor initiates a new start sequence, indicating the beginning of a subsequent phase or procedure.

level2_segments.summary: The robot is powered on and undergoes initial calibration to prepare for the procedure.
The robot is dressed to establish a sterile environment.
The base and calibration arrays are installed and removed, followed by the attachment of the saw tip.
